visual_description: The woman lies in a hospital bed covered with a pink blanket, wearing a white patterned gown and looking toward a man in a light jacket who leans over her. The scene shifts to show the same man standing by a curtain, pulling it aside while a man in a plaid shirt sits in a chair nearby. Finally, a different woman with dark hair lies in a bed, holding her stomach and looking to the side with her mouth open.
